title: Proteomics research in forest trees: A 2012-2022 update.
author: Castillejo MA Pascual J Jorrin-Novo JV Balbuena TS
content: S-EPMC10114611 PMC10114611 Proteomics research in forest trees: A 2012-2022 update. This review is a compilation of proteomic studies on forest tree species published in the last decade (2012-2022), mostly focused on the most investigated species, including Eucalyptus, Pinus, and Quercus
